report.summary: Cycle v9: No new commits (still at e999560, Mar 17 — 7 days stale). Git locks 8 days old (P0). 666 uncommitted files (+4 since v8). All 26 today-published pages have page.tsx. 438 published slugs, 335 with dedicated page.tsx. 42 TS errors unchanged. Rate limiter and defi-yields fallback still unwired.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TODAY'S PAGES: All 26 pages published on 2026-03-23 (batches 1–8) have dedicated page.tsx files — no missing routes.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 438 total (+0 since v8). 335 have dedicated page.tsx files; 103 rely on dynamic [slug] routes.
PAGE.TSX FILES: 1,104 total page.tsx files in src/app (+2 since v8).
TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX-in-TS syntax). Unchanged across all cycles.
BUILD: Local build crashed with bus error (OOM in sandbox VM). ignoreBuildErrors:true still active in next.config.ts — Vercel builds succeed despite TS errors.
PUBLISH QUEUE: Empty — all planned pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES as of 2026-03-23.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: 0 commits this cycle, no new breakage introduced.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 CORE API ROUTES PRESENT: prices (60s TTL), trending (5min), fear-greed (10min), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (5min), defi-yields (5min cache header).
CACHE HEADERS: All 6 core routes have proper Cache-Control/stale-while-revalidate headers. Plus cache-stats, health, news-rss (9 total API routes with caching).
RATE LIMITER: Still only wired to cache-stats and health routes. 0/6 core public routes have rate limiting (40+ cycles unfixed).
DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: 0 fallback data references in defi-yields/route.ts (40+ cycles unfixed).
LIVE API HEALTH: Cannot verify runtime from sandbox — egress blocked. CoinGecko and DefiLlama pings timed out. No code changes since last verified.

sections.title: DevOps
items: PRODUCTION: Running commit e999560 (Day 62 publish), deployed Mar 17. No new deploys in 7 days.
GIT LOCKS [P0]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 8 days old. All commits and pushes blocked. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 666 uncommitted files (+4 since v8). Drift continues to accumulate without ability to commit.
NEXT.JS CONFIG: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true, trailingSlash=true. All security headers present.
ignoreBuildErrors:true remains active — production builds pass despite 42 TS errors.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys. Publish queue is now empty — all pages promoted in code but not deployed.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git lock files — 8 days old. Single command fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock. Must be resolved before any commits or deploys.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes (40+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: defi-yields missing fallback data (40+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts need cleanup.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 published slugs without dedicated page.tsx files.
DELTA vs v8: +4 uncommitted files (662 → 666), +2 page.tsx files (1102 → 1104), git locks now 8 days old (unchanged).
RECOMMENDATION: Resolve git locks immediately, batch-commit 666 pending files, deploy to bring production current with codebase.
